metadata.title: Unexpected Double Kill from a Quick Site Rotation in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a fast site rotation catch enemies off guard and turn into a clean double kill. Timing and sharp aim make all the difference here.
What’s your favorite spot for a surprise rotate?

Drop your best rotate plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Drop your best rotate plays in the comments!
